job_title: Business Intelligence Generalist, Product Data Warehouse
job_nlp_title: Business Intelligence Generalist, Product Data Warehouse
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, SQL, Data Visualization, Looker
skill_match_scores: Business Intelligence:0.0, Data Analytics:1.0, SQL:1.0, Data Visualization:1.0, Looker:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, 2 years of experience in business intelligence or data analytics, 2 years of experience in SQL and data visualization (e.g., Looker, Tableau, Power BI, Qlik, or similar technologies)
preferred_quals: Experience with data warehousing or data modeling concepts, Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Hadoop, Spark, Python, or R), Experience with translating business requirements to BI solutions, Experience with explaining technical analysis to stakeholders
core_responsibilities: Drive Ads and Measurement feature adoption by developing scalable, shareable sales tools, dashboards, data, and programs using internal tools, Synthesize advertiser data and conduct analyses to deliver insights and actionable recommendations for product and sales leadership, Define and prioritize KPIs to drive key global initiatives that will be used by regions, countries, and sales pods in all sales channels, Be a strategic thought partner to commercial leaders of products, Manage special projects as assigned
job_summary: Google is a leading technology company seeking a Business Intelligence Generalist for their Product Data Warehouse team. The role involves leading the measurement and monitoring of data products, developing KPIs, dashboards, and conducting analyses to provide insights and drive sales initiatives.
